title: Difficulty+
description: Enemies spawn with enchantments and armor as you gain xp
body:
![infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WfZNLe65/images/a0724f2a689875ee0fda9dc46a074dc1c01fbd93.png)

A mod intended to make Minecraft more interesting without adding any new items or mobs, or changing vanilla balance. 
As anyone in the game gains XP, the chance to spawn a mob with special effects goes up. These effects include: Potions, Weapons, Armor, and Enchantments.
